candidates.why: Inventory component on the balance sheet, not an income statement cost-of-sales expense.

variables.notes: No clear income statement row for cost of goods sold/cost of sales/direct service costs is present in the preview. 'Raw Materials' is a balance sheet inventory line, so it should not be used for COGS.

candidates.why: Likely operating overhead bucket, though broad and may include non-SG&A items.
Explicit SG&A-type row; preferred semantically even though preview values are empty.
Typical overhead component and suitable SG&A component.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Used the explicit SG&A row 'Sales & Admin.' plus 'Personnel Expenses' because the SG&A row appears mostly empty in the preview. Excluded totals and excluded depreciation/amortization. Did not use 'External Expenses' because it is broad and may capture non-SG&A/direct costs.
No dedicated research and development row appears in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; preferred core financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest component; include with interest expense to improve coverage.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease - positive value
candidates.why: Appears to be the same lease-interest concept shown with opposite sign/format in another year; less preferred than the main lease-interest label.
Could contain recurring finance costs, but too broad and not clearly interest-specific here.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest line; avoid duplicate counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest cost rows and avoided 'Total Financial Expense' to prevent double counting with components. Excluded supplemental/duplicate lease-interest row and broad non-interest finance items.

candidates.why: Income statement associate earnings, not equity on the balance sheet.
Only clear balance sheet equity line available.
Balancing line, not a reported equity measure.
Total balance sheet size, not book equity.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity or owners-attributable equity line is shown, so 'Total Equity' is the best available book equity measure. Consistent with using MIB as empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears in the balance sheet preview.
